personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean (adapted for robust civic utility)
personality_one_liner: A highly legible, command-center utility that balances iOS-native spaciousness with robust civic functionality and strong status visibility.

spacing.rule: Generous touch targets (56px minimum for buttons). High clarity for field use.

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: Secure entry point with visual indication of the selected well.

states.error: Standard alert toast or banner above login form.

screens.layout: Well selector at the top using large distinct cards (colored by well accents), followed by JWT form.

screens.name: PublicView
screens.purpose: Read-only shift status and quick contact tap-to-call for the 9 socio members.

states.empty: Illustration of well with 'No members found'.
states.error: Error loading members with a retry button.

screens.layout: Header with selected well color. List of 9 members. Distinct 'En turno' (green badge) vs 'Inactivo' (grey text). Phone numbers are large tap targets.

screens.name: SocioDashboard (Inicio, Estadísticas, Historial, Perfil)
screens.purpose: Main command center for a well member.
screens.layout: 4 Bottom tabs. Inicio: Top KPI/Calendar showing the month's turns. Below calendar, large 56px action buttons for 'Emergencia' (3 options modal), 'Recorrido', 'Notificaciones', 'Multas'.

screens.name: ContadorDashboard (Multas, Perfil)
screens.purpose: Accountant interface focused entirely on fines management.

states.empty: Illustration of a clean slate 'No hay multas registradas'.

screens.layout: 2 Bottom tabs. Multas screen: List of fines using Accordion pattern. Collapsed: Name, amount, date, status badge. Expanded: Details and actions. Floating Action Button (FAB) at bottom right to create new fine.

screens.name: Multas (Socio View)
screens.purpose: Read-only view of fines for a member.
screens.layout: Accordion list. Pagado (Green badge), No pagado (Red badge). Tap to open detail modal.

well_isidro_bg.alt: Sky blue water texture for San Isidro well

well_zapata_bg.alt: Emerald green water texture for Zapata well

well_cardenas_bg.alt: Amber water droplets texture for Cardenas well

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply Inter font and 56px minimum height to all Buttons and Pressables.

Implement Web specific layout constraint: Wrap the root app layout in a centered container with a maximum width of 480px. Apply a subtle box shadow to simulate a phone frame on web viewports. Background of the body outside this frame should be a neutral grey (e.g. #E2E8F0 in light, #0F172A in dark).
Use the exact provided hex codes for success (pagado) and error (no pagado) badges across Fines.
For the calendar, keep day cells large with high touch areas. Color code the day cells or markers based on the selected Well's accent color (Isidro=Sky Blue, Zapata=Emerald Green, Cardenas=Amber).
Accordion UI for fines: Collapsed row shows Fine type, amount, date, and status. Tap to expand and show full details. Use appropriate ARIA roles or accessible states where applicable.
Contador view features a Floating Action Button (FAB) +Nueva Multa pinned to the bottom right, clearing the scrolling list padding.
For multi-tenant separation, ensure the login screen visually highlights the selected well using its accent color.
Use `react-native-chart-kit` for the Estadísticas tab, ensuring chart colors use the brandPrimary or specific well accent colors to remain visually consistent.
Render image backgrounds with a gradient scrim behind text to ensure readability, especially for well-selection cards.
